description_for_human: Find profitable FFXIV market board arbitrage opportunities across worlds and data centers.
description_for_model: A tool for finding arbitrage opportunities on the Final Fantasy XIV market board. Scans ~10,000 items across NA, EU, and OCE regions. Provides endpoints for arbitrage opportunities, bargains (items listed below DC average), cross-DC price disparities, item sale history, and current discounted listings. All prices in gil. No authentication required.
